summary: Completed comprehensive mobile PWA UI testing for Beauty Parlour website upgrade. All customer-facing PWA features verified working correctly on mobile viewport (375x800). Admin dashboard testing skipped due to changed admin credentials.

test_credentials.admin_note: Admin credentials (admin@lotus.com/admin123) not working - password changed

context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile PWA features verified working. Bottom nav shows 6 items (Home, Services, Gallery, Videos, Book, Profile) on <768px. Book button is elevated. WhatsApp button expands on tap and auto-collapses after 3 seconds. Services page shows 2-column grid with price badges. Gallery has 3-column Instagram-style grid with scrollable filters. Videos page has 2-column responsive grid with play button overlays. Admin dashboard mobile UI code reviewed - has mobile header, bottom nav, and slide-out menu implemented but cannot test due to changed admin password.

pwa_install_prompt.note: PWA install prompt may not show immediately - depends on browser and installation state
